description: This file defines negation in the Future Simple tense in Njo Viri (Balanda). Future simple negation expresses actions that will not take place in the future.

general_principle.statement: Future simple negation in Balanda is formed by retaining the future prefix 'le-' on the verb and adding the negation marker 'gba' sentence-finally.

negation_structure.description: Used to express that a future action will not occur.
constraints: The future prefix 'le-' must remain attached to the verb
The verb must remain in base form
The negation marker 'gba' must appear sentence-final

tense_and_aspect_distinction.rule: Future simple negation encodes tense only.
tense_and_aspect_distinction.note: The copula 'ma', the progressive prefix 'ti-', and the result marker 'dheki' must not be used.

word_order_rules.rule: Negation does not change word order.

error_constraints: Do not use 'ma' for future negation
Do not move 'gba' from sentence-final position

english: I will not eat fish
She will not drink water
We will not sleep on the bed
Uku will not go to school
Ngande will not come home
They will not walk in the compound
She will not run fast
Uku will not work in the garden
The child will not play in the compound
I will not watch the dog
I will not speak Balanda
The girl will not write words
I will not read a book
He will not think about it
They will not know it
I will not ask them
Ngande will not tell them

balanda: Wilii lekeye ti naa ni gba
english: The girl will not call her mother
I will not love you
He will not fear the snake
She will not hate him
Ngande will not surprise him
He will not seem calm
The girl will not tie the shoe
He will not cut the pot
I will not pull the door
We will not push the box
The girl will not wash the shoe
I will not hide the beads
Ngande will not build a house
I will not create words
She will not change the words
I will not turn the door
We will not add money
I will not describe Balanda
They will not help the poor
Ngande will not initiate the project
I will not contribute to the project
The girl will not separate trash
We will not uphold the law
I will not want water
She will not give money
I will not find money
Uku will not try the cloth
Ngande will not leave home
I will not arrive in Wau
He will not sharpen the knife
Ngande will not imitate adults
We will not start the project
He will not fall
